title: RoleConfig
description: Configuration for a KĀDI worker agent role. Defines capabilities, infrastructure, and behavior for a specific agent role.

capabilities.description: Capability keywords for task matching. Incoming tasks are validated against these.

maxConcurrentTasks.description: Maximum number of tasks this agent can execute concurrently

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree where this agent creates output

eventTopic.description: Base KĀDI event topic prefix (e.g., 'task' for task.assigned, task.completed)

commitFormat.description: Git commit message template. Use {taskId} as placeholder.

provider.description: LLM provider configuration (optional — agent works without it but cannot execute LLM tasks)

maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per LLM call

memory.description: Memory service configuration (optional — agent works without persistent memory)

enabled.description: Whether memory service is active for this role

namespace.description: Memory namespace for isolating this role's data (lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphens)

tools.description: List of MCP tool prefixes this role can invoke (e.g., 'git_git_', 'ability_file_')

networks.description: KĀDI networks this role joins (e.g., ['artist', 'git', 'qa', 'file']). Defaults to ['utility', 'global'] if omitted.

mainRepoPath.description: Absolute path to the main git repository (for worktree creation)
